title: Security Control Matrix
description: Maps a pinned security standard's controls to the code that implements them, the tests/CI jobs that verify them, and the required gates that enforce them (ADR-0072). Validated by scripts/governance/check_control_matrix.py.

standard.description: Human name of the standard, e.g. 'OWASP ASVS' or 'OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications'.

version.description: Pinned version of the standard, e.g. '5.0.0'. Bumping it is a tracked decision.

id.description: Control identifier within the standard, e.g. 'V11.3.2' (ASVS chapter.section.requirement).

control.description: Short statement of what the control requires.

implemented_by.description: Repo paths that implement the control. Each MUST exist (dead path fails CI).

verified_by.description: How the control is verified: a test path (MUST exist) or a CI job id as 'ci:<job name>' (MUST be a real CI job).

gate.description: Required-check names that block merge for this control. Each MUST be a real CI job.

status.description: Coverage state. 'n/a' REQUIRES a justification (anti-fabrication, CLAUDE.md §3.6).

justification.description: Required when status is 'n/a' (and recommended for 'partial').
